title: Cupets
description: This mod brings your mob heads to life!
body:
![CupetsLogo](https://imgur.com/nVcRwXi.png)

## This mod brings your mob heads to life!

### ABOUT

Cupets allows you to transform your mob heads into small collectible pets that follow you around and grand you special you effects.

### FEATURES

*   100+ Custom Heads
*   Mobs drop Heads
*   Use Soulsand on Head
*   Speical Effects
*   Custom Sounds

### MISC

Feel free to include Cupets in your Modpack.

[Cute heads, cuter pets!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cupets)
